messages.content: {"snippet":"A regression gate that blocks a release when the offline eval pass-rate drops below a fixed threshold catches most prompt-drift defects before they ship. Treat the golden set as a unit test for the agent.","source":"src-eval","title":"Evaluation gates for agents (synthetic field note)"}
